step_a.description: Forward verification: PART2 V3 claims -> SOT

details.part2_ref: PART2 L96, L109 module table: I=25, E=16, A=8(sic), S=7(sic), B=6, C=7, D=6, EVX=6 = 81
details.note: V3 total = V1(32) + V2(+10) + V3(+39) = 81. PART2 L4071 confirms: V1(32 CORE) + V2(10 COND) + V3(39 EXP) = 81.

details.claim: V3 cost ceiling = 266,000 KRW/month ($200) ABSOLUTE LOCK
details.sot_ref: D2.0-07 section 4.1: V3 = 266,000 KRW ($200). AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 11.2.1 confirms.
details.note: Exact match. PART2 uses 'ABSOLUTE LOCK' designation which is consistent with RULE 1.3 cost ceiling policy.
Consistent across all SOT sources.

details.sot_ref: D2.0-07 section 3.2 defines up to L3 (FULL_AUTO). No L4 defined in SOT.
details.note: D2.0-07 autonomy model defines 4 levels: L0-L3 only. PART2 introduces L4_SELF_EVOLVING which has no SOT definition. This may be an intentional PART2 extension, but the SOT does not define it.

details.sot_ref: SDAR_SPEC section 1.4: V3=ON (AR-L3~AR-L4 graduated), section 10.3: AR-L4 AUTO_AGGRESSIVE
details.note: SDAR_SPEC confirms V3 includes AR-L4 with HIGH risk repairs + S-8 governance integration.
81 - 42 (V2) = 39 new EXP modules for V3. Consistent.

details.claim: V3 infra = K8s (full) or Hetzner CX31 + RunPod Serverless (recommended)
details.sot_ref: No SOT specifies deployment topology at this level
details.note: Infrastructure choices are PART2-specific implementation guidance. Appropriate for an implementation guide. Cost structure analysis ($123-142/month) is within $200 ABSOLUTE LOCK.

details.claim: V3 Agent Teams: max 50+ agents, dynamic spawn/teardown
details.note: Exact match with SOT.

details.claim: V3 includes all collaboration patterns including Multi-Agent Mesh and Federated
details.part2_ref: PART2 V3-Phase 2 groups 8-9 (A-6 Federated, A-7 Remote Executor)
details.sot_ref: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC section 9.3: all patterns + Multi-Agent Mesh + Federated
details.note: PART2 includes both A-6 Federated and A-7 Remote Executor in V3-Phase 2.

details.sot_ref: D2.0-01 section 5.7/5.8: S-Series defined as Self-evo subsystem
details.note: PART2 V3-Phase 2 includes S-2~S-8 sequential implementation with BaseSelfEvo(ABC) inheritance.
Code-as-Policy, Adversarial, Log-prob etc. all listed.

details.claim: V3 Hetzner CX31 + RunPod Serverless total cost ~$123-142/month
details.note: Implementation-level cost analysis. Breakdown: Hetzner=$8 + RunPod=$6-15 + Polygon=$79 + LLM API=$20-30 = $113-132. PART2 says $123-142. Range is plausible but slightly higher than component sum, possibly accounting for network/storage overhead.

details.claim: V3 vLLM self-hosting with A10G GPU
details.sot_ref: PLAN-3.0 section 0.6(D): V3 priority includes Self-evo, external expansion
details.note: vLLM self-hosting is consistent with V3 Enterprise goal. Cost estimate ~$144/month for A10G is noted as requiring monitoring.

details.claim: V3 Cloud Library: full autonomous mode (E-15 + S-5 fully autonomous)
details.note: CLOUD_LIBRARY_SPEC confirms V3 = E-15 + S-5 fully autonomous operation.

details.claim: V3 A2A Protocol: Google A2A + MCP bidirectional
details.sot_ref: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC section 9.3: A2A Protocol = Google A2A + MCP bidirectional
details.note: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 9.3 defines V3 A2A Protocol integration. PART2 V3 sections mention MCP but do not explicitly reference Google A2A protocol.
Like V2, per-task budget not reflected in PART2.

details.part2_ref: Implied through A-4 module (already V2 COND)
details.sot_ref: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC section 9.3: Debate Mode = always ON
details.note: A-4 Debate Mode is COND in V2, and SOT says always ON in V3. PART2 does not explicitly mark V3 debate as always-on, but module is already active from V2.

step_b.description: Reverse verification: SOT V3 critical facts -> PART2 presence

details.sot_fact: V3 SDAR AR-L4 HIGH risk actions: RA_011(apply_code_hotfix), RA_012(schema_migration), RA_013(retrain_local_model), RA_014(reconfigure_infrastructure) (SDAR_SPEC 10.3)
details.note: PART2 V3 section states 'AR-L4 + Self-evo' in the comparison table but does not list the 4 HIGH risk repair actions specific to V3. SDAR_SPEC 10.3 defines these explicitly.

details.sot_fact: V3 Agent Mesh: P2P agent network with ADD-080 (AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 9.3)
details.note: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 9.3 defines Agent Mesh as V3 feature. PART2 V3-Phase 2 mentions PARL Agent Swarm but not the P2P Agent Mesh pattern specifically.
SOT lists 4 orchestration styles for V3: Centralized + Hierarchical + Market-based + Stigmergic. PART2 does not mention Market-based or Stigmergic orchestration.

details.sot_fact: V3 cost: V3 model strategy = Main-focused, flagship active usage (D2.0-07 4.1)
details.note: PART2 L106 shows V3 LLM = 'Claude + vLLM (self-hosting)', consistent with main-model focused strategy.

details.sot_fact: V3 SDAR S-8 Self-evo Governance integration (SDAR_SPEC 10.3)
details.note: PART2 V3-Phase 2 group 4 includes S-8 Governance. V3-Phase 3 referenced for completion.

details.sot_fact: V3 Agent isolation 5 dimensions: context, file, tool, network, code sandbox (AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 11.1.3)
details.note: AgentIsolationPolicy with 5 isolation dimensions defined in SOT but not in PART2. Phase 2 finding F-A4-05 persistent.

details.sot_fact: V3 Managed DB: Qdrant Cloud, Neo4j Aura, Managed PostgreSQL
details.note: PART2 L3706-3708 lists all three managed DB options for V3.
PART2 L3709 includes Loki + Grafana in V3-Phase 1.

details.sot_fact: V3 dynamic team composition: automatic agent spawn/teardown based on task (AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 9.3)
details.note: PART2 V3-Phase 2 group 15-16 includes PARL Agent Swarm with auto-scaling.
PART2 E-15 Cloud Collector references 7-Stage Discovery and CLOUD_LIBRARY_SPEC.

details.sot_fact: V3 Enterprise features: multi-tenancy, SOC-2/GDPR compliance, audit logging (D2.0-06 2.2)
details.note: D2.0-06 section 2.2 V3 mentions multi-tenancy, SOC-2/GDPR, audit logging as enterprise patterns. PART2 V3 section does not explicitly address these compliance requirements.
PART2 L3704 and L3759-3775 detail Helm chart structure with Blue-Green deployment.

details.check: V3 $200/month ABSOLUTE LOCK covers K8s/GPU/managed services
details.note: Path B (Hetzner CX31 + RunPod Serverless) achieves ~$123-142/month within $200 budget. Path A (full K8s) may exceed $200 depending on cloud provider, hence PART2 recommends Path B.

details.check: V3 vLLM self-hosting on A10G GPU realistic within cost constraints
details.note: RunPod A10G at $0.20/hour x 24h x 30d = $144/month for persistent GPU. Combined with other costs ($8 Hetzner + $79 Polygon + $20-30 LLM API), total could reach $251-261/month, exceeding $200 ABSOLUTE LOCK. Serverless (on-demand) mode is necessary to stay within budget, but PART2 already notes this in the Hetzner path.

details.check: V3 39 EXP modules implementable in 12-16 weeks
details.note: V3-Phase 2 (6 weeks) + V3-Phase 3 (6 weeks) = 12 weeks for EXP modules. ~3 modules/week is more reasonable than V2's pace. PARL Agent Swarm and Self-evo subsystem are the most complex items.

details.check: V3 SDAR AR-L4 code hotfix (RA_011) is safely implementable
details.note: apply_code_hotfix requires snapshot + automated testing + human notification. SDAR_SPEC 10.3 mandates 'snapshot mandatory, approval recommended'. Risk: automated code changes in production require robust CI/CD and rollback mechanisms. PART2 V3 does not detail the safety harness for code hotfix automation.

details.check: V3 Federated Agent (A-6) authentication protocol feasible
details.note: PART2 L4137 specifies mTLS + JWT after DEFER-AT-004 resolution. Standard protocols. However, the DEFER tag means this is not yet fully designed.
PART2 L4039 flags V3-004 as unresolved: 'GraphRAG 90% benchmark undefined'. No evaluation dataset or metric definition exists. This is a known gap that needs resolution before V3-Phase 2.

details.check: V3 PARL Agent Swarm with 100 parallel sub-agents
details.note: PART2 L4018 specifies up to 100 parallel. On Hetzner CX31 (2vCPU/8GB), this would require lightweight agent processes. Most sub-agents would be LLM API callers, not local compute. Feasible with async architecture.

findings.description: V3 L4_SELF_EVOLVING autonomy level has no SOT definition
findings.evidence: D2.0-07 section 3.2 defines 4 autonomy levels: L0(FULL_MANUAL), L1(SUPERVISED), L2(SEMI_AUTO), L3(FULL_AUTO). PART2 L108 introduces L4_SELF_EVOLVING which is not in the SOT autonomy model.

findings.description: V3 SDAR AR-L4 HIGH risk repair actions (RA_011~RA_014) not detailed in PART2
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC 10.3 defines 4 HIGH risk actions: apply_code_hotfix, schema_migration, retrain_local_model, reconfigure_infrastructure. PART2 V3 section only mentions 'AR-L4 + Self-evo' without listing specific actions.

findings.description: V3 Enterprise compliance features (multi-tenancy, SOC-2/GDPR, audit logging) not detailed in PART2
findings.evidence: D2.0-06 section 2.2 V3 defines enterprise patterns. PART2 V3 section focuses on infra and modules but lacks compliance implementation details.

findings.description: V3 Google A2A Protocol integration not explicitly mentioned in PART2
findings.evidence: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 9.3 lists 'A2A Protocol: Google A2A + MCP bidirectional' as V3 feature. PART2 V3 sections reference MCP but not A2A.

findings.description: V3 Agent Mesh and Stigmergic orchestration patterns not in PART2
findings.evidence: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 9.3 defines Multi-Agent Mesh + Market-based + Stigmergic orchestration for V3. PART2 mentions PARL Agent Swarm but not these specific patterns.

findings.description: V3 per-task budget (5,000 KRW) from AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 11.2.1 not in PART2
findings.evidence: SOT defines V3 per-task budget = 5,000 KRW. PART2 only states monthly/daily limits.

findings.description: V3 vLLM persistent GPU hosting may exceed $200 ABSOLUTE LOCK when combined with other costs
findings.evidence: RunPod A10G $0.20/hr x 720hr = $144/month + Hetzner $8 + Polygon $79 + LLM $25 = $256. Must use serverless (on-demand) mode. PART2 acknowledges this with Path B recommendation but V3 Phase 1 prompt still references persistent A10G.

findings.description: V3 SDAR AR-L4 code hotfix (RA_011) lacks safety harness details in PART2
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC 10.3 allows apply_code_hotfix with snapshot+notify. PART2 V3 does not detail automated testing, rollback verification, or approval policies for code-level auto-repair.

findings.description: V3 Agent isolation 5 dimensions (AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC 11.1.3) not in PART2
findings.evidence: AgentIsolationPolicy defines context/file/tool/network/code sandbox isolation. Persistent from Phase 2 F-A4-05.

resolved: v8 Agent 4 LOCK-AT 17/17 full match - confirmed and remains valid
v8 Agent 4 Dim B 16/18 MATCH - most forward checks still hold
v8 SOURCE_CONFLICT items (2) resolved in v13.0.0 update
new: F-A4-01 (L4_SELF_EVOLVING no SOT definition - V3 specific finding)
F-A4-02 (V3 SDAR AR-L4 actions not detailed)
F-A4-07 (V3 GPU cost may exceed ABSOLUTE LOCK)
F-A4-08 (V3 code hotfix safety harness missing)
persistent: Agent isolation 5 dimensions missing (Phase 2 F-A4-05 -> F-A4-09)
Agent lifecycle states missing from V3 section (Phase 2 F-A4-03, covered under Agent 3 for V2)
